'''Caryn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who had served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during both institutions' final decade.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Caryn had received a good deal of formal [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and implied to her future apprentice that she was a follower of "the old ways".<ref name="TRG" />

During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Caryn had found her way to a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where she became known as a local storyteller. Popular amongst the village's children, she would regale them with tales of brave heroes and epic adventures underneath the [[Takka tree|takka]] trees. One day, she approached a local girl of sixteen or seventeen [[Galactic Standard Calendar|years]], named [[Ana Tathis]]. Caryn had sensed that Tathis was strong in the Force, and wished for Tathis to become her [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]]. Tathis eagerly took to Caryn's training, and labored in her master's tropical gardens, making them lush with beauty. Through her physical labors, Tathis learned focus and concentration. Over the course of three years, Caryn taught her the skills of [[Force power/Legends|controlling her body]], [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]], [[Force sense/Legends|seeking out knowledge]] and [[Farsight/Legends|Farsight]]. Though Tathis became quite skilled, she was never able to read Caryn's mind. After a time, Caryn felt that she had taught Tathis all she was able, and bid her farewell.<ref name="TRG" />
